rationale: Integer 0 encoded with the 1-byte additional-info form (0x18 0x00) instead of the shortest single-byte form (0x00). Well-formed, but violates shortest-encoding (P1/D2).
Integer 0 in the 2-byte (0x19) form instead of single-byte 0x00.
Integer 23 in the 1-byte extension form (0x18 0x17); 23 must be the immediate 0x17 (max immediate value).
Integer 256 in the 4-byte (0x1a) form; it fits the 2-byte form 0x19 0x0100.
Negative integer -1 (major type 1) in the 1-byte extension form (0x38 0x00) instead of the immediate 0x20.
Negative integer -65536 (major type 1, arg 65535) in the 4-byte form; it fits the 2-byte form 0x39 0xffff.
